economic_notes: Nation has 30 GBEs with aggregate revenue of $121.6M and aggregate assets of $210.5M. Enterprises include oil/gas, hotel, casino, catering, security, sawmill, environmental, oilfield services, and advertising businesses. GBEs guaranteed by Nation up to $39.5M aggregate with $32.25M outstanding at year end.
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to obtain sufficient audit evidence on GBE investments accounted for under modified equity method — same qualification existed in prior year. Nation has 30 GBEs (unaudited supplementary info) with aggregate revenue of $121.6M. Two entities fully consolidated: CLFN FNDF Corporation and Nu Ch'anie Society. Trust funds of $5.64M administered by ISC. During the year $1,345,692 of interest payable to Primrose Lake Trust was converted to long-term debt. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $21,965,922 + FNIHB $4,049,524 + FNDF $6,381,809 + Other government grants $2,423,673 + Dene ts'edi Society grants $1,211,915 = $36,032,843. OSR = $40,490,989 - $36,032,843 = $4,458,146 (includes Donations $6,412,568 + Other $4,168,842 + contributions carried forward net -$6,123,264). No remuneration schedule included in the provided text.
